nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John II Tempest was born in 1315, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Katherine Sherbune. He died in 1379, in Bracewell, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John II Tempestは1315年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた。彼はKatherine Sherbuneとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1379年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブレイセウエルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John II Tempest(은)는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났다. 그는 Katherine Sherbune(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 브라스웰에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John II Tempest родился в 1315 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Katherine Sherbune. Он умер в 1379 г. в местности бреисюелл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
